title: eriosema lateriticola
intro: Eriosema lateriticola, also known as the lateritic pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Eriosema lateriticola include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a tea or infusion from the leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
